subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad Shafi, thou who hast interceded on behalf of others, the Pardoner noticed thee from His most radiant habitat
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد شفیع توجه الیک الشافع من مقره الانور مقام ینطق فیه مالک القدر باسرار
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @exhortations and counsels, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
